description:
Add rate limiting to login.
Threshold: 5 attempts, then a 15 minute lockout.
Uploads over 2MB fail, returning a 500 error
Multi-step tour for new users, dismissible at any point
Export to CSV, JSON, and PDF formats

Dashboard takes 8s to load.
Suspect missing index on events table.
Support TOTP apps, with backup codes
On small screens, menu overlaps the logo
Document the new limits in the public docs
Select many items, archive in one action
Warn at 2 minutes left, offer to extend
